description: Review-first backfill of official source pages for legacy YCFO program records whose stored sourceUrl is only a CommunityForce application portal (application_source_only). Promotable rows get a real official sourceUrl; the existing CommunityForce link stays as applicationLink. Hold rows are flagged and left unchanged. URLs sourced via web research 2026-06; verify before apply.

entries.title: Daniel Merriman/Ted Bensinger III Fellowship for Davenport Seniors
entries.note: Official Davenport page describes it for juniors, not seniors; stored title may be inaccurate.

entries.title: Charles H. Siegel Traveling Fellowship
entries.note: No dedicated page; Office of Fellowships catalog listing is the canonical official source.

entries.title: Alec Ellison '84 and Tamar Sadeh '85 Israel Travel Fund
entries.note: Administered via Slifka Center Israel Summer Travel common application; non-yale.edu official landing page.

entries.title: Global Health Awards for Internships or Non-Research Projects
Elisa Spungen Bildner '75 and Robert Bildner '72 Israel Travel Grant
entries.note: Administered via Slifka Center Israel Summer Travel common application; non-yale.edu official landing page.

entries.title: Political Science Summer Research and Internship Grants
Mellon Mays and Bouchet Common Application
Summer Journalism Fellowships: Yale College Summer Journalism
entries.note: Verify the CommunityForce fund maps to YJI vs the separate Bildner Summer Journalism Fellowship before apply.

entries.title: Julia Vance and Jason Carter Travel Fellowship
entries.note: No distinct live official page found; survives only as historical award lists + CommunityForce fund. Keep capped until a real source exists.

entries.title: Gordon Grand Fellowship
entries.note: Postgraduate award (year after graduation), NOT an undergraduate-tenure program. Currently mis-tagged undergraduate_relevant; recommend correcting undergraduateOnly=false (suppress), not promoting.

entries.title: Office of Fellowships Summer Projects Common Application
entries.note: Aggregator common-application, not a single program page; keep capped rather than promote an aggregator to student_ready.
